rows.text: College of Defence Management (CDM), Secunderabad (Telangana) Driver, Cook, MTS, Stenographer Vacancy 2026 Short Details of Advertisement Notification
For Driver & Stenographer : 18-27 Years For Cook & MTS Posts : 18-25 Years Age Limit as on : Available Soon The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Skill Test (Post Wise) Medical Examination Document Verification

Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade) : Level-2 (Rs. 19900-63200/-) Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) : Level-1 (Rs. 18000-56900/-) Stenographer Grade-II : Level-4 (Rs. 25500-81100/-) Cook : Level-2 (Rs. 19900-63200/-)

Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade) : 12th Passed, HMV Driving License, 02 Years Experience. Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) : 10th Class Passed. Stenographer Grade-II : 12th Passed, Stenography [Dictation : 10 Mins @ 80 wpm, Transcription (English : 50 Mins & Hindi : 65 Mins)]. Cook : 12th Passed, 02 Years Experience / Undertaking in the Trade OR ITI in Cook Trade.
